title: Department Manager Vacancy at Spencer's Retail Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Spencer's Retail Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Spencer's Retail Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Department Manager at our Nashik location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Spencer's Retail Holdings Services:
Spencer's Retail Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail Holdings Services!
